column1: # Manually CEFR-classified B1–C2 lemmas that neither wordlist covered.
# Lowest priority in resolve() — Goethe and the supplemental A1–C2 list both win.
# Seeded by hand from clean, cross-verified (>=2 general dicts) unlisted words;
# noise (proper nouns, inflected forms, OCR junk) rejected during classification.
# The full ~17k clean B2+ tail needs a batch pass. Extend by appending rows.
